problem id: e915879a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  11011001 -> 01010111
  00100001 -> 00110100
  11111100 -> 11100001
  11100001 -> 01001100
  11010010 -> 00110011
  01110111 -> 11010101
  01000111 -> 11001011
  00110001 -> 00111110
  11010000 -> 01110010
  10101111 -> 10100010

query: 00000001
predicted answer: 00100000
